result.stderr:
diagram 0.0.6+32a7e439a25467428f9d3e323d36aed663586d18
Harold-Andreas Zellner

  -i, --inputs               Required. Comma-separated list of input file or
                             directory paths. Accepts files with extensions: cs,
                             sln, csproj, dll, exe. For directories, includes
                             all .cs files. Use '*' for recursive search.

  -o, --output               (Default: ./diagram.txt) File path for the
                             generated diagrams. Default is './diagram.txt'.

  -t, --types                (Default: namespace,class,property,field)
                             Comma-separated list of types to collect:
                             namespace, class, struct, interface, method,
                             property, field, enum. Default is
                             'namespace,class,property,field'.

  -f, --filter-namespace     (Default: .*) Comma-separated list of namespaces to
                             include. Accepts wildcards. Default is '.*'.

  -c, --filter-class         (Default: .*) Comma-separated list of classes to
                             include. Accepts wildcards. Default is '.*'.

  -m, --filter-method        (Default: .*) Comma-separated list of methods to
                             include. Accepts wildcards. Default is '.*'.

  -j, --filter-field         (Default: .*) Comma-separated list of fields to
                             include. Accepts wildcards. Default is '.*'.

  -r, --filter-property      (Default: .*) Comma-separated list of properties to
                             include. Accepts wildcards. Default is '.*'.

  --filter-structs           (Default: .*) Comma-separated list of structs to
                             include. Accepts wildcards. Default is '.*'.

  -w, --write-types          (Default: false) Include type information in the
                             diagram. Default is false.

  -d, --indent               (Default: 2) Number of spaces for indentation in
                             the output. Default is 2.

  -b, --brackets             (Default: `) Character used for brackets in the
                             diagram. Default is '`'.

  -n, --between-name-type    (Default:  : ) String used between name and type in
                             the diagram. Default is ' : '.

  -g, --prefix-group         (Default: **) Prefix used for groups in the
                             diagram. Default is '**'.

  -p, --prefix-items         (Default: - ) Prefix used for items in the diagram.
                             Default is '- '.

  -a, --auto                 (Default: false) Automatically open the output file
                             after writing. Default is false.

  -v, --verbose              (Default: false) Enable verbose logging. Default is
                             false.

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.

options.description: Comma-separated list of input file or directory paths. Accepts files with extensions: cs, sln, csproj, dll, exe. For directories, includes all .cs files. Use '*' for recursive search.
Automatically open the output file after writing. Default is false.
String used between name and type in the diagram. Default is ' : '.
Character used for brackets in the diagram. Default is '`'.
Comma-separated list of classes to include. Accepts wildcards. Default is '.*'.
Comma-separated list of fields to include. Accepts wildcards. Default is '.*'.
Comma-separated list of methods to include. Accepts wildcards. Default is '.*'.
Comma-separated list of namespaces to include. Accepts wildcards. Default is '.*'.
Comma-separated list of properties to include. Accepts wildcards. Default is '.*'.
Comma-separated list of structs to include. Accepts wildcards. Default is '.*'.
Number of spaces for indentation in the output. Default is 2.
File path for the generated diagrams. Default is './diagram.txt'.
Prefix used for groups in the diagram. Default is '**'.
Prefix used for items in the diagram. Default is '- '.
Comma-separated list of types to collect: namespace, class, struct, interface, method, property, field, enum. Default is 'namespace,class,property,field'.
Enable verbose logging. Default is false.
Include type information in the diagram. Default is false.
